params.amountAMin: Minimum amount of token A (slippage protection)
params.amountBMin: Minimum amount of token B (slippage protection)

returns.amountA: Actual amount of token A added
returns.amountB: Actual amount of token B added

getAmountOut(uint256,uint256,uint256).details: Calculate output amount using constant product formula with fee

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

params.amountAMin: Minimum amount of token A to receive (slippage protection)
params.amountBMin: Minimum amount of token B to receive (slippage protection)
params.liquidity: Amount of LP tokens to burn

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

params.amountIn: Amount of token A to swap
params.amountOutMin: Minimum amount of token B to receive (slippage protection)

returns.amountOut: Actual amount of token B received

params.amountIn: Amount of token B to swap
params.amountOutMin: Minimum amount of token A to receive (slippage protection)

returns.amountOut: Actual amount of token A received

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.
